message:
refactor: update branding to X and remove unused imports

BRANDING CONSISTENCY:
Updated module documentation to consistently use "X" instead of
"Twitter/X" across the codebase. This aligns with the current
platform branding and the README documentation.

Files updated:
- src/storage.rs: "SQLite storage for X archive data"
- src/search.rs: "Tantivy-based full-text search engine for X data"

UNUSED IMPORT CLEANUP:
Removed imports that were declared but never used in the codebase.
This cleanup was identified through careful code review and verified
by compiling with all warnings enabled.

Removed imports by file:

src/main.rs:
- anyhow::Context (no .context() or .with_context() calls)
- chrono::Utc (DateTime operations use storage/search modules)
- std::io::Write (clap_complete::generate uses io::stdout() directly)
- tracing::{debug, error, warn} (only info! macro used)

src/search.rs:
- once_cell::sync::Lazy (no lazy static initialization)
- tantivy::query::FuzzyTermQuery (fuzzy search not implemented)
- tantivy::query::PhraseQuery (phrase queries use QueryParser)
- tracing::{debug, warn} (only info! macro used)

src/parser.rs:
- chrono::TimeZone (DateTime parsing uses parse_from_str)
- std::collections::HashMap (removed during earlier refactor)
- tracing::{debug, warn} (only info! macro used)

src/storage.rs:
- rusqlite::Transaction (transactions use Connection methods)
- tracing::debug (only info! macro used)

This cleanup reduces compilation time marginally and makes the actual
dependencies of each module clearer for future maintenance.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
